data: Interview Preparation - Thank You and Follow-up Communication
Interview Preparation - Thank You and Follow-up Communication
Learn how to write thank you and follow-up messages after interviews

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to write a thank you and follow-up message after an interview.

Sending a thank you message leaves a positive impression on the interviewer.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a2c5fcb1-718b-4a1f-ae96-490b15f1631e-Interview---Thank-you-follow-up.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to thank the interviewer and share your next expectation, use this structure:

"Thank you for the opportunity to interview for [role]. I look forward to [next step]."

For example: "Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the HR executive role. I look forward to receiving your feedback."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a2c5fcb1-718b-4a1f-ae96-490b15f1631e-Interview---Thank-you-follow-up.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

After a sales interview, you can say:

"Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the sales executive position. I look forward to hearing from you."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a2c5fcb1-718b-4a1f-ae96-490b15f1631e-Interview---Thank-you-follow-up.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure helps you close the conversation professionally and express your interest.

It shows the interviewer that you are polite and serious about the role.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a2c5fcb1-718b-4a1f-ae96-490b15f1631e-Interview---Thank-you-follow-up.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice writing thank you and follow-up messages!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct thank you message after an interview

1.Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the marketing associate role. I look forward to the next steps.
2.Thanks for the interview. Hope to hear from you.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct follow-up message after a software developer interview

1.When are you going to tell me if I got the job or not?
2.Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the software developer position. I look forward to your decision.

Correct answer: 2

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. You have completed an interview for a sales executive role. Write your thank you message.'

'2. You have finished an interview for a marketing associate position. Write your follow-up message.'

'3. You attended an interview for an HR executive role. Write your thank you note.'

'4. You completed a technical interview for a software developer position. Write your message.'

'5. You had an interview for a customer service role. Write your thank you and follow-up message.'"
